title: Mark Levinson 600 Series
bodyHtml:
Mark Levinson 600 Series

The 600 Series redefines what’s possible from preamplifiers and amplifiers, delivering an experience of power, precision, and purity that is unmistakably Mark Levinson.

The series introduces three new reference components: the № 626 dual-monaural preamplifier, the № 632 dual-monaural amplifier, and the flagship № 631 Monaural Amplifier — all designed, engineered, and assembled in the USA.

‍

‍

Each model is built upon Mark Levinson’s proprietary Pure Path circuit philosophy and features the brand’s iconic Tectonic industrial design, which is sculpted from solid aluminum and accented with red signature lighting that glows like embers beneath volcanic glass. Every detail, from the custom-machined enclosures to the glass core and mechanically isolated foot architecture, speaks to the brand’s commitment to performance and purity.

  • № 626: The № 626 dual-monaural preamplifier is a celebration of sonic fidelity, blending an all-analog signal path with a high-resolution digital core. At its heart is the Precision Link III DAC, capable of decoding up to 32-bit/384 kHz PCM and native DSD audio through its six digital inputs. The analog stage is anchored by a fully balanced Pure Path architecture, while a Pure Phono MM/MC phono stage and Main Drive Class A headphone amplifier make the № 626 a complete solution for every source. Designed with modular isolation, dual power supplies, and vibration-damped foot architecture, this is a preamplifier that lets the music speak for itself and say everything.
  • № 632 and № 631: Designed for those who demand authority and refinement in equal measure, the № 632 dual-monaural amplifier and № 631 monaural amplifier deliver dynamic headroom and clarity that unveil the full scale of a performance.

Both amplifiers feature Class A/AB operation, Pure Path fully balanced signal paths, and robust toroidal power supplies housed within their own dedicated modular chassis. The № 632 offers stereo flexibility and dual-mono separation, while the № 631 delivers uncompromised performance as a single-channel powerhouse.

The Mark Levinson 600 Series will be available in Q4 2025 through select Mark Levinson retailers and partners worldwide. The recommended retail prices are $25,000 USD for the № 626 or $30,000 USD for the № 632, and $40,000 USD for a single № 631.

For more information, visit https://www.marklevinson.com.
